questions.question: What does RMSprop stand for?
options: Revamped Momentum with Adaptive learning rate
Radical Momentum with Adaptive learning rate
Regular Momentum with Adaptive learning rate
Radical Momentum with Adaptive learning rate
questions.explanation: Revamped Momentum with Adaptive learning rate

questions.question: What is the main difference between RMSprop and Adam?
options: Adam uses Momentum, RMSprop uses Nesterov Accelerated Gradient
Adam uses Nesterov Accelerated Gradient, RMSprop uses Momentum
Adam uses Radial Basis Functions, RMSprop uses Linear Regression
Adam uses Radial Basis Functions, RMSprop uses Linear Regression
questions.explanation: Adam uses Nesterov Accelerated Gradient, RMSprop uses Momentum

questions.question: What is the learning rate in Adam?
options: Fixed learning rate
Learning rate that adapts to the magnitude of the gradient
Learning rate that adapts to the magnitude of the gradient and the previous parameter value
Learning rate that adapts to the magnitude of the gradient only
questions.explanation: Learning rate that adapts to the magnitude of the gradient and the previous parameter value

questions.question: Which optimization algorithm is more computationally expensive than RMSprop?
options: RMSprop
Adam
Nesterov Accelerated Gradient
Bounded RMSprop

questions.question: What is a key advantage of using Adam over RMSprop?
options: Adam is more computationally expensive
Adam is more prone to divergence
Adam is more adaptable to different problem types
Adam is more difficult to implement
questions.explanation: Adam is more adaptable to different problem types
